nasb.text: The time has come, the day has arrived. Let not the buyer rejoice nor the seller mourn; for wrath is against all their multitude.

esv.text: The time has come; the day has arrived. Let not the buyer rejoice, nor the seller mourn, for wrath is upon all their multitude.

cnv.text: 時候到了，日子近了， 買的不必歡喜，賣的不用憂愁； 因為烈怒要臨到眾人身上。

ccb.text: 时候到了，日子近了，买主不要欢乐，卖主也不要忧愁，因为烈怒临到了所有的人。
